emails.subject: Account Review Request 1
emails.body: Hi, when you get a chance, could you review your account details? Just a routine check.

emails.subject: RE: Account Review Request 1
emails.body: Sure, I’ll take a look shortly.

emails.subject: RE: Account Review Request 1
emails.body: Following up — would be great to get this done by end of week if possible.

emails.subject: RE: Account Review Request 1
emails.body: This is becoming urgent — we need confirmation to avoid service interruption.

emails.subject: URGENT: Account Action Required 1
emails.body: URGENT: We need immediate action on your account. Failure to respond may result in temporary suspension.

emails.subject: CRITICAL: Account Lock Imminent 1
emails.body: CRITICAL: Your account will be locked within 1 hour unless you verify immediately. Complete the process here: http://security-alert-response.net
